description: Markdown vault MCP server with FTS5 + semantic search and frontmatter indexing
name: io.github.pvliesdonk/markdown-vault-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the markdown vault directory
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_SOURCE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Disable write tools
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Log level for FastMCP internals; app loggers default to INFO, -v overrides both to DEBUG
environmentVariables.name: FASTMCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Event store backend for HTTP session persistence (file:///path or memory://)
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_EVENT_STORE_URL

environmentVariables.description: MCP server name shown to clients
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_SERVER_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Directory for index and embeddings state files
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_STATE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Path to the FTS5 SQLite index file
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_INDEX_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Path to the numpy embeddings file
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_EMBEDDINGS_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated frontmatter fields to index for search
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_INDEXED_FIELDS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated frontmatter fields required on every document
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_REQUIRED_FIELDS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated glob patterns to exclude from indexing
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_EXCLUDE

environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider to use
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (required when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=openai)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Ollama embedding model name
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OLLAMA_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Force CPU-only inference for Ollama
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OLLAMA_CPU_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Ollama server base URL
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Git authentication token for push/pull
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Remote git repository URL for managed mode
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_REPO_URL

environmentVariables.description: Git username for token auth
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Git committer name
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_COMMIT_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Git committer email
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_COMMIT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Seconds to wait before pushing (batches writes)
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_PUSH_DELAY_S

environmentVariables.description: Enable Git LFS support
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_LFS

environmentVariables.description: Seconds between periodic git pulls (0 to disable)
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_GIT_PULL_INTERVAL_S

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed attachment extensions, or * for all
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_ATTACHMENT_EXTENSIONS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum attachment size in MB (0 for unlimited)
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_MB

environmentVariables.description: Folder name for note templates within the vault
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_TEMPLATES_FOLDER

environmentVariables.description: Path to user-defined MCP prompt templates
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_PROMPTS_FOLDER

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authentication
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: OIDC auth mode: 'remote' (JWKS validation) or 'oidc-proxy' (OAuth proxy). Auto-detected if not set.
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Public base URL of this server (required for OIDC)
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: OIDC discovery endpoint URL
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_CONFIG_URL

environmentVariables.description: OIDC client ID
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OIDC client secret
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Signing key for OIDC session JWTs (critical on Linux/Docker)
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_JWT_SIGNING_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Expected OIDC token audience
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_AUDIENCE

environmentVariables.description: Space-separated required OIDC scopes
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_REQUIRED_SCOPES

environmentVariables.description: Verify access token JWT instead of id_token
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_OIDC_VERIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override Claude app domain for MCP Apps iframe sandboxing
environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_VAULT_MCP_APP_DOMAIN

title: Markdown Vault MCP
